name: skillshome-desktop-sidecar
description: Local profile extraction via @menporulalar/agents-core, run directly with node/ts-node. Reads the desktop app's real Extraction_Source setting (task 4.9) and, for Local_Model/BYOK_Frontier sources, stages/confirms the result over the real MCP server via the official SDK client (task 4.11). No Tauri/Rust process-spawning wiring yet — that's task 4.12's job.
